Passionate software developer with a deep interest in Bitcoin technology.
I create content and provide education to help people understand Bitcoin and its potential.

about.title: About Me
about.text: I'm a passionate software developer with a strong interest in Bitcoin technology. Through my experience in software engineering, I've developed a deep appreciation for Bitcoin's innovative approach to money and decentralization.
about.content: As a content creator and educator, my mission is to demystify Bitcoin and make it accessible to everyone. I create educational content across multiple platforms to help people understand Bitcoin's fundamentals, its technology, and its potential to transform the financial system.
about.you: Whether you're a beginner looking to understand Bitcoin basics, someone curious about the technology behind it, or exploring how Bitcoin fits into the broader financial landscape, I'm here to help you on your Bitcoin learning journey.

why.text: I'm a software developer: I understand Bitcoin from the code, not just the theory
I explain in plain language, without unnecessary jargon
I have hands-on experience with wallets, Bitcoin nodes and Lightning Network
I went from zero to educator in a few years — I know the journey from the inside

timeline.text: Started career as a software developer
Launched courses with Bitcoin Edu Veneto
Started educational content on social media

corsoBase.title: Bitcoin Base Course
corsoBase.description: Five lessons to take you from zero to real, independent use of Bitcoin. Every session is 1:1, live on video call — we go at your pace, on what actually matters to you.

m1.title: Why Bitcoin Exists
m1.description: The problem with today's money: inflation, loss of purchasing power, trust vs mathematics. The 2008 crisis, the genesis block, Bitcoin as a response.

m2.title: How Bitcoin Works (without unnecessary jargon)
m2.description: Blockchain explained simply, transactions, miners and security, decentralisation, the 21-million supply cap.

m3.title: Wallets and Custody
m3.description: Custodial vs non-custodial, seed phrase, types of wallet. Practical: install a wallet and receive your first sats.

m4.title: Actually Using Bitcoin (on-chain + Lightning)
m4.description: On-chain vs Lightning, fees and times, when to use which. Practical: send sats and make your first real Lightning transaction.

m5.title: Buying, Security and Mindset
m5.description: How to buy Bitcoin (exchange vs P2P), 'not your keys, not your coins', mistakes to avoid, long-term mindset.

faq.q: Do I need technical knowledge to take this course?
faq.a: No, the course is designed for complete beginners. Everything starts from first principles and each concept is explained with practical examples — nothing is taken for granted.
Every session is 1:1 on video call with Roberto. Before we start you can tell me what you want to focus on — the pace and content adapt to you.
You will be contacted within 24 hours to agree on dates and times. You will receive materials and slides before each session.

faq.q: Can I buy just a few sessions?
faq.a: The course is sold as a complete 5-module path. If you prefer a more flexible approach, you can consider an individual consultation instead.
Yes, a full refund is available if requested before the first session. Once the course has started, refunds are not available for sessions already delivered.

approfondimentoBitcoin.title: Advanced Bitcoin Course
approfondimentoBitcoin.description: Ten lessons to take you from user to genuinely competent in Bitcoin. 1:1 sessions via video call — from the technical to the practical, at your pace.

m1.title: Review + Advanced Mental Model
m1.description: UTXO model (cash analogy), Bitcoin layers, security/scalability trade-offs.

m2.title: Advanced Wallets with Sparrow
m2.description: Sparrow Wallet in depth, coin control, fee management, change addresses. Real hands-on practice.

m3.title: Privacy on Bitcoin
m3.description: Pseudonymity vs anonymity, KYC vs no-KYC, basic coinjoin, address reuse, XPUB risks.

m4.title: Advanced Security
m4.description: Metal backups, multisig (concepts), air-gapped setups with Tails OS, common attacks.

m5.title: Lightning Network Deep Dive
m5.description: Channels, liquidity, routing, custodial vs self-custodial Lightning.

m6.title: Running Your Own Node
m6.description: Full node, Bitcoin Core, electrs. Why to do it and how — from theory to hands-on experience.

m7.title: Fees, Mempool and Optimisation
m7.description: How the mempool works, fee market, RBF/CPFP, UTXO consolidation.

m8.title: Advanced Buying and P2P Strategies
m8.description: P2P (Vexl and others), privacy vs convenience, DCA vs lump sum, accumulation strategies.

m9.title: Economic Aspects and Bitcoin Cycles
m9.description: Halving, market cycles, narrative vs reality.

m10.title: Full Setup + Real Simulation
m10.description: Complete user setup (wallet, backup, basic privacy) + simulation: buy → move → pay → hold.

faq.q: Do I need to have taken the base course first?
faq.a: It is not required, but having a basic understanding of Bitcoin is recommended. The first module does a thorough recap to ensure you have solid foundations before going deeper.

faq.q: Is this course suitable for developers?
faq.a: Yes, the course covers both the technical side (cryptography, scripts, Lightning Network) and the practical side (security, custody, tax aspects). Ideal for those with a technical background who want to go deep on Bitcoin specifically.
Each session is around 1.5 hours. The pace and duration can vary depending on the topics and your needs — the format is flexible.

faq.q: Do I receive materials between sessions?
faq.a: Yes, each module includes slides, notes and further reading resources. You also have access to session recordings to revisit the concepts.
A full refund is available if requested before the first session. Once the course has started, refunds are not available for sessions already delivered.

bitcoinPayment.title: Pay with Bitcoin
bitcoinPayment.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your Bitcoin wallet — the BTC amount is calculated at the current exchange rate.

lightning.bolt12Info: BOLT12 is a reusable offer — your wallet generates a unique invoice automatically each time. Compatible with Phoenix ≥ 3.0, Zeus, Mutiny.
lightning.bolt12AmountNote: Enter this amount in your wallet:

instructions.title: How to pay with Lightning:
instructions.step1: Choose your preferred method from the three tabs above
instructions.step2: Scan the QR code with a Lightning wallet (Phoenix, Muun, Breez, Zeus, etc.)
instructions.step3: Payment is instant — confirmed in seconds
instructions.step4: Fill in the form below with your details after payment

instructions.title: How to pay on-chain:
instructions.step1: Scan the QR code with your Bitcoin wallet — the correct amount is already included
instructions.step2: Or copy the address and enter the BTC amount manually
instructions.step3: Send the transaction and fill in the form below with your details
instructions.step4: You will be contacted within 24 hours to confirm and grant access

owner.title: Data Controller
owner.text: Roberto Cedolin, based in Italy. Contact: roberto.cedo{'@'}gmail.com

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.text: We collect the following personal data when you use our services:
items: Name and email address (via payment confirmation form)
Payment data processed by Stripe (we do not store card details)
Language preference (saved in a browser cookie)
IP address and browser data (standard server logs)

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: Personal data is used exclusively to: deliver the purchased service (consultation or course), send payment confirmations, schedule consultations via Calendly, and respond to support requests. Data is never sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.text: We use the following third-party services: Stripe (payment processing, Privacy Policy at stripe.com/privacy), Calendly (scheduling, Privacy Policy at calendly.com/privacy), Wallet of Satoshi (Lightning payments). Each service processes data according to its own privacy policy.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to deliver the service and comply with legal obligations (typically 10 years for invoicing purposes under Italian law). You may request deletion of your data at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.text: Under the GDPR you have the right to: access your personal data, request correction or deletion, object to processing, request data portability, and lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority (Garante della Privacy). To exercise these rights, contact us at roberto.cedo{'@'}gmail.com.

services.title: Services Offered
services.text: Roberto Cedolin offers Bitcoin education consultations (30-minute sessions at €40, 60-minute sessions at €70, and intensive 3-hour sessions at €180) and online courses ("Introduction to Bitcoin" at €400). Services are delivered remotely via video call or digital content.

payments.title: Payments
payments.text: Payments are accepted via credit/debit card (Stripe) or Bitcoin (on-chain and Lightning Network). Prices are inclusive of VAT where applicable. Payment must be completed before the service is delivered.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.text: Consultations: a full refund is available if cancelled at least 24 hours before the scheduled session. No refund is issued for cancellations made less than 24 hours in advance or for no-shows. Courses: a full refund is available if requested before the first session takes place. Once the first session has been delivered, no refund will be issued.

delivery.title: Service Delivery
delivery.text: Consultations are delivered via video call (Google Meet or similar) at the time agreed via Calendly. Course access details are sent by email within 24 hours of confirmed payment. Roberto Cedolin reserves the right to reschedule consultations with 24 hours' notice.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.text: All course content, materials, and recordings are the exclusive property of Roberto Cedolin. Purchasers receive a personal, non-transferable licence for their own educational use. Reproduction, redistribution, or resale of course content is strictly prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text: The educational content provided is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice. Roberto Cedolin is not liable for any financial decisions made based on the content of consultations or courses.

law.title: Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed by Italian law. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Italy.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any questions regarding these terms: roberto.cedo{'@'}gmail.com
